[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 1000001010 3
5 0100100000 2
6 0000001010 2
7 0001101000 3

01 10 1000100010 3
12 21 1000000010 2
23 32 0000001000 1
34 43 0100101000 3
45 54 0010101010 4
56 65 0010001010 3
67 76 0010000011 3
70 07 1000000010 2

02 20 1000001010 3 match 4
13 31 0100100000 2 match 5
24 42 0000001010 2 match 6
35 53 0001101000 3 match 7
46 64 0010001011 4
57 75 1011000110 5
60 06 0000001010 2 match 6
71 17 1000000011 3

03 30 0000101000 2

36 63 0000001000 1
47 74 0010000011 3
50 05 1000101010 4
61 16 0000000011 2
72 27 1000000110 3

04 40 0000101010 3

26 62 0000001010 2 match 6
37 73 0001000000 1
